# Solana Dust Cleaner

A high-performance, open-source, client-side dApp to scan and close empty Solana token accounts and reclaim locked SOL rent deposits.

## Key Info
- **URL**: https://solanadustcleaner.com
- **Repository**: https://github.com/con4ig/solana-dust-cleaner
- **License**: MIT
- **Architecture**: 100% client-side Next.js dApp. No custom smart contracts.

## Security & Transparency
- All transaction construction happens client-side using audited, official Solana programs.
- Token accounts are verified mathematically to hold a balance of exactly zero before closure. Active token balances cannot be lost.
- All instructions (including the rent reclaim and fee transfer) are fully inspectable in the wallet approval modal before signature.

## Fee Structure
Fees are split dynamically directly inside the client-side generated transaction:
- Under 0.05 SOL reclaimed: 5% fee to commission address.
- 0.05 to 0.20 SOL reclaimed: 2% fee to commission address.
- Above 0.20 SOL reclaimed: 1% fee to commission address.

Commission Address: `81kTLKjRBJBXt4CWz8mv5Fq9mSQVQsU9pDW81rbszxFT`
